Tim Cook is also Epstein-adjacent:

Tim Cook is featured in Epstein's Black Book, on page 67. He hung out with Epstein according to the recently released emails (sources below).

Tim Cook has never had a known partner (source below) and a leading Apple developer has publicly named Cook as a child abuser (again, source below) . There's a reason why Tim Cook 'resigned' recently.

Apple's house is on fire.

From the article:

    Tim Cook abuses children. This is well-documented... Tim Cook has, bizarrely, never had any identifiable partner of any sort. Readers will note that this was also the case for notorious pedophile, Jimmy Savile...

These are the type of big-name Epstein clients that are pushed to the margins of public-awareness by the media.
